---
title: "Get Involved"
subtitle: "Join the community effort to build safer streets in Ventura"
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
```

We're building a network of Ventura residents, advocates, cyclists, and pedestrians who want to make our streets safer. Whether you want to attend meetings, contribute data, or just stay informed, fill out the form below and we'll be in touch.

```{=html}
<div class="form-wrapper">
  <!--
    TO CONFIGURE: Replace the src URL below with your Google Form embed link.
    In Google Forms: Send → Embed (< >) → copy the iframe src URL.
    Format: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/YOUR_FORM_ID/viewform?embedded=true
  -->
  <iframe
    src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf_REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_FORM_ID/viewform?embedded=true"
    height="960"
    title="Safe Rec Ventura Community Interest Form"
    loading="lazy">
    Loading form…
  </iframe>
</div>

<p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#aaa;text-align:center;margin-top:0.75rem">
  Having trouble with the form?
  <a href="mailto:adams.annie11@gmail.com">Email us directly</a>.
</p>
```

---

### Ways to get involved

- **Attend community meetings** — Show up and speak at city planning and transportation meetings.
- **Map your observations** — Report unsafe conditions, near-misses, and crash sites in your neighborhood.
- **Share the data** — Help spread awareness by sharing our crash map with friends, neighbors, and on social media.
- **Write to officials** — Use our [Take Action](take-action.html) page to email a decision maker today.
- **Volunteer** — Help with data collection, community outreach, or event organizing.
